subject: Fermi  trigger No 763581136: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V.Lipunov, E.Gorbovskoy, N.Tiurina,  P.Balanutsa, , D.Vlasenko, I.Panchenko,

L.Carrasco, J.R.Valdes, V.Chavushyan, V.M.Patino Alvarez, J.Martinez,
A.R.Corella, L.H.Rodriguez (INAOE, Guillermo Haro Astrophysics Observatory) 

MASTER-Kislovodsk robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, Kislovodsk Solar Station of Pulkovo observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB250313.74 (trigger No 763581136,18h 42m 24.00s , +00d 58m 58.8s, R=6.27) errorbox  27520 sec after notice time and 27564 sec after trigger time at 2025-03-14 01:31:35 UT, with upper limit up to  18.0 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 56 deg. The sun  altitude  is -21.3 deg. 

The galactic latitude b =  2 deg., longitude l = 33 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2811247

We obtain a following upper limits.
